title: v1alpha1SyncPolicyAutomated
description: v1alpha1SyncPolicyAutomated schema from Argo CD API

allowEmpty.title: AllowEmpty allows apps have zero live resources (default: false)

enabled.title: Enable allows apps to explicitly control automated sync

prune.title: Prune specifies whether to delete resources from the cluster that are not found in the sources anymore as part of automated sync (default: false)

selfHeal.title: SelfHeal specifies whether to revert resources back to their desired state upon modification in the cluster (default: false)
